<mxPoint x="150" y="600" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="22" value="自动部署到测试环境" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="90" y="490" width="120" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="24" value="人工/自动化验收" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="260" y="490" width="120" height="60" x="260" y="600" width="120" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
